lazortron.name: Lazortron MK II.
lazortron.description: Breakthrough in the battery tech has allowed Blackguard to mount Lazor Beams on tanks. It will burn its way through enemy defenses with pinpoint precision.
lazortron.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.
lazortron.attackSpeedLabel: 0.064s between shots in salvo; 1.2s between salvos (25 shots)

rain_maker.name: Rain Maker
rain_maker.description: This experimental long range artillery will outrange all but the most far-reaching defenses and rain down with its badaboom shells.
rain_maker.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.
rain_maker.attackSpeedLabel: 0.2s between shots in salvo; 10s between salvos of 4

critter_cannon.name: Critter Cannon MK II.
critter_cannon.description: The critters' popularity and success on the battlefield inspired the creation of this prototype. Swamp enemies with these cute and deadly machines!
critter_cannon.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

heavy_choppa.name: Heavy Choppa
heavy_choppa.description: The flying clown car of the battlefield! Instead of laughs this unit delivers seemingly endless stream of bullets.
heavy_choppa.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

turret_engineer.name: Turret Engineer
turret_engineer.description: This crafty Engineer has designed compact turrets that expand upon hitting the ground and attack enemy buildings.
turret_engineer.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

critter_engineer.name: Critter Engineer
critter_engineer.description: This crafty Engineer has his own set of critters that he throws at enemy buildings.
critter_engineer.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

cryobombardier.name: Cryobombardier
cryobombardier.description: These Bombardiers throw ice bombs against enemy buildings, slowing them down and dealing moderate damage. They require extra energy to deploy as they are slightly older (but more experienced) than most troops.
cryobombardier.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

clone_rifleman.name: Clone Rifleman
clone_rifleman.description: These Riflemen multiply after being destroyed up to two times. Each clone is slightly weaker and deals less damage than the Rifleman before him.
clone_rifleman.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

cryotank.name: CryoTank
cryotank.description: The CryoTank is a massive tank that freezes enemy buildings, slowing them down and dealing moderate damage. Each CryoTank requires extra energy to land ashore.
cryotank.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

dr_vitamin.name: Dr. Vitamin
dr_vitamin.description: Dr. Vitamin throws vitamins at other troops to boost one or many of their abilities for a short period of time.
dr_vitamin.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

shockaneer.name: Shockaneer
shockaneer.description: The Shockaneer shocks enemy buildings, stunning them and dealing moderate damage. Enemies, beware of her Shock Beam!
shockaneer.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.
shockaneer.attackSpeedLabel: 0.075s between hits in beam; 2s reload time

protector.name: Protector
protector.description: This Native Islander is ready to help our cause against the Blackguard. She protects other troops with crystal shields for a short period of time.
protector.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

melon_bombardier.name: Melon Bombardier
melon_bombardier.description: The Bombardier is shooting... watermelons? Why not? Be careful though, these watermelons are exploding with flavor.
melon_bombardier.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

mega_scorcher.name: MegaScorcher
mega_scorcher.description: A more massive version of the scorcher, the MegaScorcher has more armor and causes bigger fires. It is also exceedingly large and takes a lot of energy to move.
mega_scorcher.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

stunner.name: Stunner
stunner.description: The Stunner is one shockingly stunning troop that deals area damage - rather inaccurately! But his shock bomb grenades make up for his inaccuracy, stunning buildings and giving his teammates more time to attack.
stunner.availabilityLabel: Current Proto Troop Workshop troop; also usable in Warships when available.

seeker.name: Seeker
seeker.description: A fast prototype troop focused on bypassing defenses and collapsing onto key targets.
seeker.availabilityLabel: Currently not available at the Proto Troop Workshop; treated as Warships-only or limited-availability prototype data.

vampire_zooka.name: Vampire Zooka
vampire_zooka.description: A prototype zooka variant built around lifesteal-style survivability in special modes.
vampire_zooka.availabilityLabel: Currently not available at the Proto Troop Workshop; treated as Warships-only or limited-availability prototype data.

hidden_warrior.name: Hidden Warrior
hidden_warrior.description: A prototype warrior-style troop with stealth or ambush-focused special behavior.
hidden_warrior.availabilityLabel: Currently not available at the Proto Troop Workshop; treated as Warships-only or limited-availability prototype data.

undercover_rifleman.name: Undercover Rifleman
undercover_rifleman.description: A prototype rifleman variant built around deceptive or delayed-engagement mechanics.
undercover_rifleman.availabilityLabel: Currently not available at the Proto Troop Workshop; treated as Warships-only or limited-availability prototype data.

zombie_rifleman.name: Zombie Rifleman
zombie_rifleman.description: A special prototype rifleman variant that appears in Warships prototype troop rotations.
zombie_rifleman.availabilityLabel: Currently not available at the Proto Troop Workshop; treated as Warships-only or limited-availability prototype data.
